items.title: Are Summer League players allowed to return to college basketball if they don’t make an NBA roster? Of course not.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
Are Summer League players allowed to return to college basketball if they don’t make an NBA roster? Of course not. 

Is that going to stop them from trying? Of course not. 

Story from Vegas on a reality that the NBA and college basketball are bracing for later this summer.

media.title: From NBA Summer League back to college basketball? NCAA coaches bracing for more roster chaos
media.description: As the NCAA's new age-based eligibility rule comes under legal attacks, some agents see a pathway from the NBA back to college

items.title: It really stings to lose James as a teammate. He’s got a great sense for how to write a really good story and always chases the good work. If anyone is in a hiring position, consider this a hearty endorsement. He’ll make your shop a lot better.

items.body_excerpt: It really stings to lose James as a teammate. He’s got a great sense for how to write a really good story and always chases the good work. If anyone is in a hiring position, consider this a hearty endorsement. He’ll make your shop a lot better.

items.title: ESPN is now reporting that LeBron James has "a focus" on the Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat and the Sixers.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
ESPN is now reporting that LeBron James has "a focus" on the Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat and the Sixers.

Those may not officially be the final three teams, but they appear to be positioned more strongly than their Western Conference competitors:

www.phillyvoice.com/report-lebro...

media.title: Report: LeBron James has 'a focus' on Sixers, Cleveland Cavaliers and Miami Heat
media.description: It sounds like at least five contenders remain in play to sign LeBron James, but the Sixers are one of three particularly strong suitors.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Erick Dampier. Big C from Miss St drafted 10th by IND in 96. Bad as rook + traded to GS in 97. Turned into solid C for GS (led NBA in reb% in 03-04). DAL signed him over Nash in 04. Not great move but Dampier was solid. Finished up w/MIA + ATL in 2012.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Erick Dampier. Big C from Miss St drafted 10th by IND in 96. Bad as rook + traded to GS in 97. Turned into solid C for GS (led NBA in reb% in 03-04). DAL signed him over Nash in 04. Not great move but Dampier was solid. Finished up w/MIA + ATL in 2012.

items.body_excerpt: With LeBron James moving on from the Lakers and the franchise going all-in on a youth movement, will the Lakers still be competitive in the Western Conference? Tracy McGrady is still optimistic.

items.title: James is the best there is
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt: James is the best there is

items.title: hire james.
items.author: Jasmyn Wimbish
items.body_excerpt:
hire james. 

he’s one of my favorite people i got to work with.
